approach: RE-OPEN (owner-ratified in-session): pod.feature scenario 'handled mail is acked immediately' names the mechanic as `cyberlegion mail read`, which today only peeks -> stale/self-contradictory. Update plugins/cyberfleet/skills/pod/SKILL.md brief-receive + handled-mail lines to the combined op to match the frozen suite.
